summary: Verified shop-page filter viewport-jump bug fix. Clicking category and mukhi filter checkboxes on /shop no longer causes any scroll jump (scrollY delta = 0). Results container maintains min-height ~720px (80vh) even when zero products match, sticky sidebar stays visible, and URL query params update correctly.
passed: Shop page loads at 1440x900 with filter sidebar + product grid
Category filter click (filter-cat-rudraksh...) — scrollY 400 -> 400, delta=0 (no viewport jump)
Mukhi filter click (filter-mukhi-5-mukhi) — scrollY 400 -> 400, delta=0 (no viewport jump)
Results container computed min-height = 720px (>= 600px requirement) with 'No products match' state
URL updates with ?category=... and &mukhi=5+Mukhi query params
Sticky sidebar remains visible in viewport (top=112, bottom=626) during/after filtering
ScrollToTop does not fire on query-param-only changes (pathname unchanged)
action_items: Optional (not in reported bug scope): investigate chip-clear scroll behavior more carefully with a stricter selector. Test observed scrollY 400 -> 0 after clicking first 'button:has(svg.lucide-x)', but this may be the test selecting a non-chip X-icon button (e.g., search/close overlay) rather than an actual filter chip. The primary viewport-jump bug fix for filter clicks is confirmed working.
